query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS keban_app.field_inspection_categories (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  `order` INT DEFAULT 0,
  weight DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS keban_app.field_inspection_questions (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  categoryId INT NOT NULL,
  questionText TEXT NOT NULL,
  points INT DEFAULT 0,
  maxScore INT DEFAULT 100,
  penaltyPoints INT DEFAULT 0,
  isCritical BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  `order` INT DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (categoryId) REFERENCES keban_app.field_inspection_categories(id)
);
